# the world of dizzi

> One person, ten local-first applications, one shared architecture - a
> source-visible personal AI network. Curated public snapshot; not open source.

## Start here
- [The system](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/system/): architecture, the app contract, shared core library
- [The ten applications](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/apps/): what each app does, with source links
- [The method](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/method/): written laws, contracts, AI build-chat orchestration
- [Journey](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/journey/): dated milestones since June 2026
- [From project to company](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/vision/): status, why it scales, what we're opening
- [About & contact](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/about/): who builds this, and how to reach him

## Source
- [Public repository](https://github.com/Dizz-Network-Dizzik/dizz-network): 966 files, one curated commit
- [Interactive system map](https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/karte/): self-contained, no external calls

## Notes
- Status: independent project, pre-incorporation. No revenue yet; the trading
  fleet runs dry-run only. Snapshot public since 23 July 2026.
- Every number on this site links to the file in the repository that proves it.
- German entry page: https://worldofdizzi.netlify.app/de/
